response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems — both mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic or hobby projects (e.g., bachelor’s thesis), and his professional work is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern tooling and CI/CD practices
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to learn and adapt across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No demonstrated professional C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks any measurable experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking domains
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
